title: Devastated Italians reckon with 'third apocalypse' of World Cup failure
summary_full: Azzurri fans and management alike are pondering what went wrong after Italy fail to qualify for third World Cup in a row.
summary_public: Azzurri fans and management alike are pondering what went wrong after Italy fail to qualify for third World Cup in a row.
